name: n8n
what_it_does: n8n is a fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities, enabling technical teams to build automations using a visual editor combined with custom JavaScript/Python code across 400+ integrations, including LangChain-based AI agent workflows.
use_cases: Building AI agent workflows with LangChain against custom data and models
Automating business processes across 400+ SaaS integrations without managing custom glue code
Creating data pipelines that combine APIs, databases, and AI processing steps
Self-hosting a Zapier/Make alternative with full code flexibility and data control
Enterprise workflow automation with SSO, advanced permissions, and air-gapped deployment
not_for: Simple two-service integrations where a dedicated connector (Zapier) is faster
Teams without technical staff to manage self-hosted infrastructure
Pure MCP-server use cases — n8n is a workflow platform, not an MCP server itself
best_when: When you need a flexible, self-hostable automation platform that combines visual building with full code access and native AI agent support across hundreds of integrations.
avoid_when: When you need a lightweight, no-code solution or when your team lacks the capacity to self-host and maintain the platform.

auth.notes: Enterprise tier adds SSO (SAML/OIDC). Per-workflow API keys. Advanced permissions on Enterprise plan. Individual node credentials managed per integration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Community self-hosted edition free under Sustainable Use License

paid_tiers.name: Enterprise
paid_tiers.notes: SSO, air-gap, advanced permissions — contact sales

pricing.notes: Fair-code license: free for self-hosting but commercial use has restrictions. Cloud pricing not published in README.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: n8n has mature error handling within workflows; MCP integration is via third-party servers (n8n-mcp, n8n-workflow-builder).
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Workflows can be designed to be idempotent but this is left to the workflow author; no platform-level idempotency enforcement.
known_agent_gotchas: n8n itself is not an MCP server — use n8n-mcp or n8n-workflow-builder to expose n8n to AI agents
Fair-code license restricts commercial use of self-hosted version without a paid license
AI agent workflows require understanding LangChain primitives in addition to n8n concepts
Self-hosted setup involves significant infrastructure overhead (Node.js, database, reverse proxy)

security_score_components.security_notes: Workflow automation platform. API key + OAuth2. Self-hostable — full control. Credential store for connected services — protect admin access. Webhook URLs are publicly accessible endpoints.
